name: Egg Noodles with Sausage
recipeIngredient: 1 bn Broccoli (1 lb), stems removed and chopped
1/2 package (16 oz) extra wide egg noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. About 1 hour before serving:
a. In a 12-inch skillet over medium heat, heat sausages and 1/4 cup water to boiling.
b. Reduce heat to low; cover and simmer for 5 minutes.
c. Remove the cover and cook, turning sausages occasionally, until water evaporates and sausages are browned, about 20 minutes.
d. Remove sausages to paper towels to drain; cut into 1/2-inch-thick slices. Place sausage slices in a bowl. Reserve drippings in skillet.
e. Meanwhile, slice carrots 1/4 inch thick; dice onion.
f. Cut off root ends and discard tough outer leaves from broccoli. Rinse and drain well.
g. In the reserved drippings in the skillet over medium heat, cook carrots and onion until vegetables are tender.
h. Add 3/4 cup water, stirring to loosen brown bits from the bottom of the skillet.
i. Add vegetable mixture to the bowl with sausages.
j. Wipe skillet dry.
k. Cook noodles as directed on the label, using 2 teaspoons salt in the water.
l. While egg noodles are cooking, in the same skillet over high heat, in hot olive or salad oil, cook broccoli, Italian herb seasoning, and 1/4 teaspoon salt until tender-crisp, 3 to 5 minutes, stirring often.
m. Return sausage mixture to skillet with broccoli; over medium heat, heat through, stirring occasionally.
n. Add egg noodles; gently toss to mix well.
